name: Omnitracs Fleet Intelligence API
what_it_does: Omnitracs REST API for fleet intelligence and transportation management platform. Enables AI agents to manage ELD (Electronic Logging Device) and HOS compliance data, handle vehicle location tracking and geofencing, access driver performance and safety scoring, retrieve fuel efficiency and consumption analytics, manage dispatch and route optimization data, handle driver messaging and workflow automation, access vehicle maintenance and diagnostics data, retrieve DVIR (Driver Vehicle Inspection Report) data, manage cargo and load tracking, and integrate fleet data with TMS and dispatch systems.
use_cases: Managing ELD and HOS compliance from fleet compliance automation agents
Accessing vehicle telematics and location from fleet tracking agents
Retrieving driver safety scoring from fleet safety management agents
Integrating fleet data with TMS and dispatch from logistics automation agents
not_for: Light-duty passenger vehicle fleets without commercial trucking needs
Non-regulated carriers without ELD and HOS compliance requirements
Small fleets without enterprise fleet intelligence investment
best_when: A commercial trucking company, carrier, or fleet operator using Omnitracs wants AI agents to automate ELD compliance, driver safety monitoring, dispatch optimization, fuel management, and TMS integration.
avoid_when: SAFETY+PRIVACY: ELD and HOS data is federally regulated — automated compliance reporting must be accurate to avoid FMCSA violations. Driver location and behavior tracking is highly sensitive privacy data. Automated dispatch changes affect driver safety. Distracted driving prevention must not create new distraction.

auth.notes: Omnitracs uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Fleet and carrier-level credentials with telematics, compliance, and dispatch scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for event and alert notifications. Subsidiary of Solera Holdings (private equity) after spin-off from Qualcomm.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-vehicle subscription required
pricing.notes: Dallas, Texas. Originally Qualcomm Fleet Management Division. Spun off 2013, acquired by Vista Equity Partners 2016, then Solera Holdings 2020. Pioneer in commercial fleet telematics. 1M+ connected vehicles. Strong HOS and ELD compliance heritage. Competes with Samsara and Geotab for fleet intelligence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; fleet-tier SLA

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY+PRIVACY: ELD/HOS data is FMCSA-regulated — errors in compliance reporting create federal violations
Driver location tracking requires privacy notice and consent — sensitive personal data
No public MCP server — REST API with developer portal
Solera Holdings ownership — verify API roadmap stability post-acquisition
Legacy Qualcomm satellite communication heritage — some APIs may have older design patterns
DVIR automation must comply with FMCSA pre-trip inspection requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Commercial fleet telematics and driver data. SOC2, FMCSA-ELD compliant. OAuth2. US/CA data residency. Driver privacy and HOS compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet telematics and driver data. SOC2, FMCSA-ELD. OAuth2. US/CA data residency. Driver location and behavior sensitivity.
